caption: The video features a man dressed in a formal suit and tie, standing in front of a backdrop that includes a logo with stars and text. He appears to be delivering a speech or presentation, as indicated by his use of hand gestures for emphasis. The setting suggests a professional or academic environment, possibly a conference or seminar. The man is speaking into a microphone, and his body language conveys confidence and engagement with his audience. The backdrop includes the website "iiea.com," hinting that the event may be related to the Institute of International and European Affairs.
